m: to see off; to pass on; to defer

ex.jp: 今回の投資案件は見送ることにした。
ex.en: I decided to pass on this investment deal.

qs.s: 予算不足のため、新システムの導入を今年度は＿＿＿＿ことになった。
qs.en: Due to budget shortfalls, the introduction of the new system was deferred for this fiscal year.
qs.e: 見送る(みおくる) = to pass on/defer (a plan, deal). 先送りする = to postpone. 延期する(えんきする) = to postpone (with a new date). 諦める(あきらめる) = to give up entirely.

qs.s: 「見送る」の意味は？
o: to see off; to pass on; to defer
qs.e: 見送る covers seeing someone off (駅で見送る = to see off at the station) and deciding not to proceed with something (計画を見送る = to pass on a plan).

m: to assign; to allocate; to apportion

ex.jp: 各チームに作業を均等に割り当てた。
ex.en: I assigned the work equally to each team.

qs.s: プロジェクトの予算をどのように＿＿＿＿かが重要な課題だ。
qs.en: How to allocate the project budget is an important issue.
qs.e: 割り当てる(わりあてる) = to assign/allocate (a task, quota). 配分する(はいぶんする) = to distribute/apportion (resources). 割り振る(わりふる) = to allot/assign (slightly more casual). 分配する(ぶんぱいする) = to distribute/share out.

qs.s: 「割り当てる」の意味は？
o: to share out; to distribute equally
qs.e: 割り当てる = giving each person or group their designated share (役割を割り当てる = to assign roles, 割り当て量 = quota).

m: review; revision; reconsideration

ex.jp: 制度の見直しが急務となっている。
ex.en: A review of the system has become an urgent task.

qs.s: 料金体系の＿＿＿＿を求める声が消費者から上がっている。
qs.en: Voices calling for a revision of the pricing structure are rising from consumers.
qs.e: 見直し(みなおし) = a review/reconsideration (often leading to change). 改正(かいせい) = revision/amendment (of a law). 改革(かいかく) = reform (large-scale). 修正(しゅうせい) = correction/revision (of a document or plan).

qs.s: 「見直し」の意味は？
qs.e: 見直し = taking another look at something to potentially change it (規則の見直し = review of rules, 見直しを図る = to seek to revise).

m: to receive; to take in; to accept; to take seriously

ex.jp: 上司の批判を真摯に受け止め、改善に努めた。
ex.en: I sincerely took my boss's criticism on board and worked to improve.

qs.s: 悪い知らせをどう＿＿＿＿かによって、その後の行動が変わる。
qs.en: How you receive bad news changes your subsequent actions.
qs.e: 受け止める(うけとめる) = to take/absorb (an impact, news — absorbing the weight of it). 受け入れる(うけいれる) = to accept/take in (without resistance). 受け取る(うけとる) = to receive (physically or informationally). 捉える(とらえる) = to grasp/perceive.

qs.s: 「受け止める」の意味は？
o: to absorb; to take on board
qs.e: 受け止める implies bearing the weight of something (ショックを受け止める = to absorb a shock, 重く受け止める = to take something seriously).

m: to remove; to eliminate; to get rid of

ex.jp: 障害を取り除くことで、プロジェクトはスムーズに進んだ。
ex.en: By removing the obstacles, the project proceeded smoothly.

qs.s: 不安の原因を＿＿＿＿ことが、ストレス解消の第一歩だ。
qs.en: Removing the cause of anxiety is the first step to relieving stress.
qs.e: 取り除く(とりのぞく) = to remove/get rid of (an obstacle, cause). 排除する(はいじょする) = to exclude/eliminate (formally). 除去する(じょきょする) = to remove (technical/official). なくす = to eliminate/lose.

qs.s: 「取り除く」の意味は？
o: to remove; to get rid of
qs.e: 取り除く is the everyday verb for removing something unwanted (ゴミを取り除く = to clear rubbish, 不安を取り除く = to dispel anxiety).

m: to use up; to exhaust; to spend completely

ex.jp: 旅行で貯金を使い果たしてしまった。
ex.en: I used up all my savings on the trip.

qs.s: 体力を＿＿＿＿すまで働き続けるのは、健康によくない。
qs.en: Continuing to work until you have exhausted your physical strength is not good for your health.
qs.e: 使い果たす(つかいはたす) = to completely use up (resources, money). 消耗する(しょうもうする) = to wear down/exhaust. 使い切る(つかいきる) = to use up completely (similar). 費やす(ついやす) = to spend/devote (time, money).

qs.s: 「使い果たす」の意味は？
o: to use up completely; to exhaust
qs.e: 使い果たす = leaving nothing left (お金を使い果たす = to spend every last penny, エネルギーを使い果たす = to be completely drained).

m: to get back; to recover; to regain

ex.jp: 休養をとって、失った体力を取り戻した。
ex.en: I took rest and regained the physical strength I had lost.

qs.s: 信頼を一度失うと、＿＿＿＿のに長い時間がかかる。
qs.en: Once trust is lost, it takes a long time to get it back.
qs.e: 取り戻す(とりもどす) = to get back/regain (something lost). 回復する(かいふくする) = to recover (health, economy). 取り返す(とりかえす) = to get back/recoup (something taken away). 取り返しがつかない = irreversible.

qs.s: 「取り戻す」の意味は？
o: to recoup; to get back (what was taken)
qs.e: 取り戻す = returning something to its former state (自信を取り戻す = to regain confidence, リードを取り戻す = to reclaim the lead).

m: to express; to put into words

ex.jp: その感動を言葉で言い表すことができなかった。
ex.en: I could not put that feeling of being moved into words.

qs.s: 複雑な感情を的確に＿＿＿＿語彙力が必要だ。
qs.en: Vocabulary is needed to accurately express complex emotions.
qs.e: 言い表す(いいあらわす) = to express in words / put into language. 表現する(ひょうげんする) = to express (through any medium). 伝える(つたえる) = to convey/communicate. 描写する(びょうしゃする) = to describe/depict.

qs.s: 「言い表す」の意味は？
o: to express; to put into words
qs.e: 言い表す focuses on verbal expression (うまく言い表せない = hard to put into words, 一言で言い表す = to sum up in one word).

m: to deduct; to subtract; to net out

ex.jp: 税金を差し引いた手取り額は思ったより少なかった。
ex.en: The take-home amount after deducting taxes was less than I expected.

qs.s: 経費を＿＿＿＿と、今月の利益はわずかだ。
qs.en: After deducting expenses, this month's profit is minimal.
qs.e: 差し引く(さしひく) = to deduct/net out. 引く(ひく) = to subtract (math). 控除する(こうじょする) = to deduct (tax/official term). 差し引いた後 = after deducting.

qs.s: 「差し引く」の意味は？
qs.e: 差し引く = subtracting one amount from another (経費を差し引く = to deduct expenses, 差し引きゼロ = net zero / breaks even).

m: to call out to; to appeal to; to urge

ex.jp: 市は市民に節水を呼びかけている。
ex.en: The city is appealing to citizens to save water.

qs.s: 政府は国民にワクチン接種を＿＿＿＿けた。
qs.en: The government urged citizens to get vaccinated.
qs.e: 呼びかける(よびかける) = to call out/appeal to (the public, a person). 訴えかける(うったえかける) = to appeal emotionally. 働きかける(はたらきかける) = to work on/lobby (someone to do something). 促す(うながす) = to urge/prompt.

qs.s: 「呼びかける」の意味は？
o: to call out to; to appeal to (public)
qs.e: 呼びかける = directing a message or appeal at someone (注意を呼びかける = to call for caution, 参加を呼びかける = to call for participation).

m: to take up; to feature; to pick up; to confiscate

ex.jp: その問題はニュースで大きく取り上げられた。
ex.en: That issue was prominently featured in the news.

qs.s: この会議では環境問題を主なテーマとして＿＿＿＿予定だ。
qs.en: Environmental issues are scheduled to be taken up as the main theme at this meeting.
qs.e: 取り上げる(とりあげる) = to take up/feature (a topic). 扱う(あつかう) = to deal with/handle. 議論する(ぎろんする) = to debate/discuss. 採用する(さいようする) = to adopt/hire.

qs.s: 「取り上げる」の意味は？
o: to take up; to feature (a topic)
qs.e: 取り上げる = selecting something to focus on (問題を取り上げる = to take up an issue, メディアに取り上げられる = to be covered by the media). Also: to confiscate (免許を取り上げる = to revoke a licence).

m: to look out over; to survey; to scan

ex.jp: 展望台から街全体を見渡すことができた。
ex.en: From the observation deck I could look out over the entire city.

qs.s: 丘の上に立って、広大な平野を＿＿＿＿た。
qs.en: Standing on the hill, I surveyed the vast plain.
qs.e: 見渡す(みわたす) = to look out over a wide area. 見回す(みまわす) = to look around (in all directions). 眺める(ながめる) = to gaze at / admire. 一望する(いちぼうする) = to take in the whole view at once.

qs.s: 「見渡す」の意味は？
o: to look out over; to survey (wide view)
to take in the whole view at once
qs.e: 見渡す = sweeping one's gaze across a wide expanse (地平線まで見渡す = to see all the way to the horizon, 見渡す限り = as far as the eye can see).

m: to inherit; to succeed to; to take over

ex.jp: 父の会社を受け継いで、三代目社長になった。
ex.en: I inherited my father's company and became the third-generation president.

qs.s: この地域の伝統文化を次世代に＿＿＿＿ことが私たちの使命だ。
qs.en: It is our mission to pass on the traditional culture of this region to the next generation.
qs.e: 受け継ぐ(うけつぐ) = to inherit/receive and carry on (heritage, spirit). 引き継ぐ(ひきつぐ) = to take over (a job, task — handover). 伝える(つたえる) = to pass on/convey. 継承する(けいしょうする) = to succeed to/inherit (formal).

qs.s: 「受け継ぐ」の意味は？
qs.e: 受け継ぐ emphasises receiving and carrying forward a legacy (伝統を受け継ぐ = to carry on a tradition, 遺伝子を受け継ぐ = to inherit genes).

m: to re-examine; to reconsider; to question again

ex.jp: この事件は、私たちの価値観を根本から問い直すきっかけになった。
ex.en: This incident became an opportunity to fundamentally re-examine our values.

qs.s: 当たり前だと思っていたことを＿＿＿＿必要があるかもしれない。
qs.en: It may be necessary to re-examine what we have taken for granted.
qs.e: 問い直す(といなおす) = to question again from scratch (深く問い直す = to deeply re-examine). 見直す(みなおす) = to review/revise. 再考する(さいこうする) = to reconsider. 疑う(うたがう) = to doubt/suspect.

qs.s: 「問い直す」の意味は？
qs.e: 問い直す = asking the fundamental question all over again (自分自身を問い直す = to re-examine oneself, 存在意義を問い直す = to question one's raison d'être).

m: to bring in; to introduce; to carry in

ex.jp: 試験会場への電子機器の持ち込みは禁止されている。
ex.en: Bringing electronic devices into the examination venue is prohibited.

qs.s: 個人的な問題を職場に＿＿＿＿ことは避けるべきだ。
qs.en: Bringing personal problems into the workplace should be avoided.
qs.e: 持ち込む(もちこむ) = to bring something into a space. 引き込む(ひきこむ) = to draw in/pull into. 押し込む(おしこむ) = to push/cram in.

qs.s: 「持ち込む」の意味は？
o: to bring in; to carry in
to draw in; to pull into
to push in; to cram in
to carry out; to take outside
qs.e: 持ち込む = carrying something from outside into a space (食べ物の持ち込み禁止 = no outside food allowed, 問題を持ち込む = to bring a problem to someone).

m: to confront; to face up to; to stand up against

ex.jp: どんな困難にも立ち向かう勇気を持ちたい。
ex.en: I want to have the courage to stand up to any difficulty.

qs.s: 不正に黙って従うのではなく、勇気を持って＿＿＿＿べきだ。
qs.en: Rather than silently going along with injustice, one should bravely stand up against it.
qs.e: 立ち向かう(たちむかう) = to confront/face up to (adversity, an opponent). 立ち上がる(たちあがる) = to stand up / rise up. 対抗する(たいこうする) = to compete against. 向き合う(むきあう) = to face up to / come face to face with.

qs.s: 「立ち向かう」の意味は？
o: to confront; to stand up against
to stand up; to rise up
to face up to; to come face to face with
qs.e: 立ち向かう = actively going up against a challenge or adversary (困難に立ち向かう = to face difficulties, 強敵に立ち向かう = to stand up to a strong opponent).

m: to devote oneself to; to throw oneself into

ex.jp: 大学時代はサッカーに打ち込み、全国大会にも出場した。
ex.en: In my university days I devoted myself to football and even competed in the national tournament.

qs.s: 仕事に＿＿＿＿すぎて、家族との時間を疎かにしていた。
qs.en: I was too absorbed in work and was neglecting time with my family.
qs.e: 打ち込む(うちこむ) = to throw oneself into (with passion). 没頭する(ぼっとうする) = to be absorbed in. 熱中する(ねっちゅうする) = to be enthusiastic/engrossed in. 集中する(しゅうちゅうする) = to concentrate on.

qs.s: 「打ち込む」の意味は？
o: to devote oneself; to throw oneself into
to be absorbed in; to be immersed in
to be engrossed; to be enthusiastic
to concentrate on; to focus on
qs.e: 打ち込む = wholehearted dedication (勉強に打ち込む = to throw oneself into studying). Also: to type in / drive in (data entry, a nail).

m: to take over; to hand over; to succeed

ex.jp: 前任者から業務を引き継ぐのに二週間かかった。
ex.en: It took two weeks to take over the duties from my predecessor.

qs.s: プロジェクトの途中で担当者が変わり、新しい人が＿＿＿＿だ。
qs.en: The person in charge changed mid-project and a new person will take over.
qs.e: 引き継ぐ(ひきつぐ) = to take over a job/task from someone (handover). 受け継ぐ(うけつぐ) = to inherit (a legacy/tradition). 担当する(たんとうする) = to be in charge of. 引き受ける(ひきうける) = to accept/take on.

qs.s: 「引き継ぐ」の意味は？
qs.e: 引き継ぐ is specifically a work handover (業務を引き継ぐ = to take over duties, 引き継ぎ書類 = handover documents). 受け継ぐ is inheriting something more lasting.

m: to catch up; to keep up

ex.jp: 必死に練習して、ようやくチームのレベルに追いついた。
ex.en: I trained desperately and finally caught up to the team's level.

qs.s: 需要の増加に供給が＿＿＿＿けず、品不足が続いている。
qs.en: Supply cannot keep up with the increase in demand and the shortage is continuing.
qs.e: 追いつく(おいつく) = to catch up (close a gap). 追い越す(おいこす) = to overtake/surpass. 追いかける(おいかける) = to chase after. 追いつかれる = to be caught up to.

qs.s: 「追いつく」の意味は？
o: to catch up; to close the gap
qs.e: 追いつく = closing the distance to someone/something ahead (トップに追いつく = to catch up to the leader). 追いつかない = can't keep up / not enough.

m: furthermore; in addition; still; moreover

ex.jp: なお、詳細については担当者にお問い合わせください。
ex.en: Furthermore, please contact the person in charge for details.

qs.s: 本日の営業は十八時までとなります。＿＿＿＿、明日は定休日です。
qs.en: Today's business hours are until 6 p.m. Note that tomorrow is our regular day off.
qs.e: なお = furthermore/note that (adds supplementary information, often in formal notices). また = also/again. さらに = furthermore/even more. ただし = however/provided that (a condition or exception).

qs.s: 「なお」の意味は？
qs.e: なお is used in written/formal contexts to add supplementary information (なお書き = a note/addendum). Also means 'still' or 'even more so' (なお一層 = all the more).

m: however; but; provided that; with the exception that

ex.jp: 参加は自由です。ただし、事前に登録が必要です。
ex.en: Participation is free. However, prior registration is required.

qs.s: この割引は会員に限ります。＿＿＿＿、新規会員は対象外です。
qs.en: This discount is limited to members. However, new members are not eligible.
qs.e: ただし = however/but (introduces an exception or condition). なお = furthermore/note. ところが = but/however (unexpected result). しかし = however/but (general contrast).

qs.s: 「ただし」の意味は？
qs.e: ただし introduces a limiting condition or exception (ただし書き = a proviso/condition clause). It is more formal/written than しかし.

m: deliberately; dare to; on purpose (against the expected)

ex.jp: 皆が賛成する中、あえて反対意見を述べた。
ex.en: While everyone agreed, I deliberately voiced a dissenting opinion.

qs.s: わかっていても＿＿＿＿難しい道を選ぶのが彼のスタイルだ。
qs.en: His style is to deliberately choose the difficult path even when he knows it.
qs.e: あえて = deliberately doing something against the easy/expected choice (challenging, not negative). わざと = on purpose (often with negative nuance, to cause trouble). 意図的に(いとてきに) = intentionally. 故意に(こいに) = with malicious intent.

qs.s: 「あえて」の意味は？
qs.e: あえて implies choosing the harder or less obvious path by intention (あえて言えば = if I dare say, あえてリスクを取る = to deliberately take a risk). No negative nuance.

m: rather; on the contrary; if anything

ex.jp: 謝るよりもむしろ、行動で示してほしい。
ex.en: Rather than apologizing, I'd prefer you show it through action.

qs.s: 失敗は恥ずかしいことでは無く、＿＿＿＿成長のチャンスだ。
qs.en: Failure is not something to be ashamed of; rather, it is a chance to grow.
qs.e: むしろ = rather/if anything (showing preference or a different frame). 逆に(ぎゃくに) = conversely/on the contrary. かえって = rather/instead (things turned out the opposite way, often unintended). いっそ = rather/better off (making a decisive choice).

qs.s: 「むしろ」の意味は？
qs.e: むしろ reframes or corrects a view (むしろ逆だ = it's rather the opposite, むしろ好ましい = if anything preferable). かえって implies an unintended reversal.

m: on the contrary; instead; unexpectedly in the opposite way

ex.jp: 薬を飲んだら、かえって具合が悪くなった。
ex.en: After taking the medicine, I unexpectedly felt worse instead.

qs.s: 助けようとしたのに、＿＿＿＿迷惑をかけてしまった。
qs.en: I tried to help but instead ended up causing trouble.
qs.e: かえって = instead/contrary to expectations (often an unintended negative outcome). むしろ = rather (preference). 逆に(ぎゃくに) = conversely (deliberate flip). かなり = quite/considerably.

qs.s: 「かえって」の意味は？
qs.e: かえって marks an unintended reversal (かえって悪化した = things got worse instead, かえって助かった = it actually helped unexpectedly).

m: on the other hand; meanwhile; one side

ex.jp: 都市部では人口が増える一方、地方では過疎化が進んでいる。
ex.en: While the population grows in urban areas, depopulation is advancing in rural areas.

qs.s: 売上は増加している。＿＿＿＿、コストも上昇しており、利益は伸び悩んでいる。
qs.en: Sales are increasing. On the other hand, costs are also rising and profits are not growing.
qs.e: 一方(いっぽう) = on the other hand / meanwhile (contrasting two things). 反面(はんめん) = on the other hand/flip side (same subject, opposite aspect). 逆に(ぎゃくに) = conversely. それに対して = in contrast.

qs.s: 「一方」の意味は？
qs.e: 一方 juxtaposes two different things or trends (一方で = on the one hand). Also: ～する一方だ = keeps getting more ~(悪化する一方だ = it just keeps getting worse).

m: in the first place; to begin with; originally

ex.jp: そもそもこの計画は実現可能だったのだろうか。
ex.en: Was this plan even feasible in the first place?

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿、この問題はなぜ起きたのかを考える必要がある。
qs.en: To begin with, we need to think about why this problem occurred.
qs.e: そもそも = in the first place / when you go back to the root (questioning the premise). もともと = originally/by nature. はじめから = from the start. 本来(ほんらい) = originally/by rights.

qs.s: 「そもそも」の意味は？
o: in the first place; at the root
from the start; from the beginning
qs.e: そもそも challenges the premise (そもそも無理だった = it was impossible from the start). It digs back to the fundamental origin or question.

m: considerably; very much; greatly; must really

ex.jp: 彼はよほど疲れていたらしく、すぐに眠ってしまった。
ex.en: He must have been very tired, as he fell asleep right away.

qs.s: あの人が怒るなんて、＿＿＿＿のことがあったのだろう。
qs.en: For that person to get angry, something must have really happened.
qs.e: よほど = considerably/must really (implies an exceptional degree). かなり = quite/considerably. 相当(そうとう) = considerably/quite (more formal). よっぽど = casual spoken variant of よほど.

qs.s: 「余程」の意味は？
qs.e: よほど marks an unusually large degree (よほど嬉しかったのだろう = must have been very happy, よほどでなければ = unless it's really serious).

m: economic conditions; business climate; boom or bust

ex.jp: 景気が回復してきたことで、雇用も改善されつつある。
ex.en: As economic conditions have recovered, employment is also starting to improve.

qs.s: 不況で＿＿＿＿が悪化し、多くの中小企業が廃業を余儀なくされた。
qs.en: With the recession the business climate worsened and many small and medium enterprises were forced to close.
qs.e: 景気(けいき) = economic conditions/business climate (景気がいい = the economy is good). 経済(けいざい) = economy (broader). 業績(ぎょうせき) = business results/performance. 市況(しきょう) = market conditions.

qs.s: 「景気」の意味は？
qs.e: 景気 is the general health of the economy as felt in daily life (景気回復 = economic recovery, 景気刺激策 = economic stimulus, 景気がいい = doing well financially).

m: circumstances; situation; reasons

ex.jp: 諸事情により、イベントを中止することになりました。
ex.en: Due to various circumstances, the event has been cancelled.

qs.s: 彼が欠席した＿＿＿＿については、後日説明があるだろう。
qs.en: There will probably be an explanation later regarding the circumstances of his absence.
qs.e: 事情(じじょう) = circumstances/reasons (often personal or complex). 理由(りゆう) = a stated reason. 原因(げんいん) = a cause. 背景(はいけい) = background/context.

qs.s: 「事情」の意味は？
qs.e: 事情 implies there's more going on beneath the surface (事情がある = there are circumstances/reasons, 家庭の事情 = family circumstances, 事情を知る = to know the details).

m: wound; injury; scratch; scar

ex.jp: 転んで膝に傷を作ったが、大したことはなかった。
ex.en: I fell and got a wound on my knee, but it was nothing serious.

qs.s: 彼女の言葉は深い心の＿＿＿＿を残した。
qs.en: Her words left a deep wound in my heart.
qs.e: 傷(きず) = a wound/scratch/scar (physical or emotional). 傷跡(きずあと) = a scar (the mark left after healing). ダメージ = damage (loanword). 打撃(だげき) = a blow/blow to something.

qs.s: 「傷」の意味は？
qs.e: 傷 = a wound or blemish (傷つける = to hurt/wound, 傷がつく = to get scratched, 心の傷 = emotional wound/trauma).

m: technique; method; approach

ex.jp: この作家は独特の手法で知られており、作品はすぐに見分けられる。
ex.en: This author is known for their unique technique and their works are immediately recognizable.

qs.s: 問題解決のための新しい＿＿＿＿を開発した。
qs.en: We developed a new technique for problem solving.
qs.e: 手法(てほう) = a technique or stylistic approach (artistic, intellectual). 方法(ほうほう) = method (general). 手順(てじゅん) = procedure/steps. 技法(ぎほう) = technical method (craftsmanship).

qs.s: 「手法」の意味は？
qs.e: 手法 implies a characteristic or sophisticated way of doing something (演出手法 = directorial technique, 手法を変える = to change one's approach).

m: content; substance; details

ex.jp: メールの内容を確認してから、返信することにした。
ex.en: I decided to check the content of the email before replying.

qs.s: この本は表紙は地味だが、＿＿＿＿は非常に充実している。
qs.en: The cover of this book is plain, but the content is very rich.
qs.e: 内容(ないよう) = content/substance (what is inside: 授業内容 = lesson content). 中身(なかみ) = what's inside (more physical/tangible). 概要(がいよう) = overview/summary. 詳細(しょうさい) = details.

qs.s: 「内容」の意味は？
qs.e: 内容 is what something consists of or contains (内容を把握する = to grasp the content, 内容が濃い = content-rich).

m: root; fundamentals; basis; the essential point

ex.jp: 問題の根本を解決しなければ、同じことが繰り返される。
ex.en: Unless we solve the root of the problem, the same thing will keep repeating.

qs.s: この事件は社会の＿＿＿＿にある不平等を示している。
qs.en: This incident reveals the inequality at the root of society.
qs.e: 根本(こんぽん) = root/fundamentals (根本的な問題 = a fundamental problem). 根底(こんてい) = the underlying base (根底から覆す = to overturn from the ground up). 根拠(こんきょ) = basis/grounds. 根源(こんげん) = the original source/root cause.

qs.s: 「根本」の意味は？
qs.e: 根本 = the deepest level (根本的に = fundamentally, 根本から変える = to change from the ground up). 根底 emphasizes what everything rests on.

m: experience; personal experience

ex.jp: 実際に現地を訪れて体験することが、理解を深める近道だ。
ex.en: Actually visiting and experiencing the place first-hand is a shortcut to deepening understanding.

qs.s: その授業では、歴史的な建築物を実際に見学する＿＿＿＿学習が取り入れられている。
qs.en: In that class, experiential learning where you actually visit historical buildings has been incorporated.
qs.e: 体験(たいけん) = personal hands-on experience. 経験(けいけん) = experience (accumulated over time). 実体験(じったいけん) = actual first-hand experience. 見学(けんがく) = a field trip/observation visit.

qs.s: 「体験」の意味は？
qs.e: 体験 is direct, sensory experience (体験談 = personal account, 体験学習 = experiential learning, 初体験 = first-time experience). 経験 is broader, including things you've done over time.

m: way; method; means; no help for it

ex.jp: やり方がわからないときは、遠慮なく聞いてください。
ex.en: If you don't know the way to do it, please don't hesitate to ask.

qs.s: もう決まったことだ。＿＿＿＿がない。
qs.en: It's already decided. There's no help for it.
qs.e: 仕方(しかた) = way/method (仕方がない = can't be helped, it's hopeless). 方法(ほうほう) = method (neutral). やり方(やりかた) = how to do something (practical). 手段(しゅだん) = means/instrument.

qs.s: 「仕方」の意味は？
o: way; method; no help for it
qs.e: 仕方 = the way something is done (仕方がない = can't be helped/nothing to be done about it, 仕方なく = reluctantly, 仕方を教える = to show how to do something).

m: the whole; entirety; overall

ex.jp: 細部にこだわるあまり、全体のバランスを見失わないようにしよう。
ex.en: While paying attention to details, let's not lose sight of the overall balance.

qs.s: 一部の問題だけでなく、プロジェクト＿＿＿＿を見渡す視点が必要だ。
qs.en: A perspective that surveys not just part of the problem but the entire project is needed.
qs.e: 全体(ぜんたい) = the whole/entirety (as a unit). 全般(ぜんぱん) = overall/in general (across the board). 全域(ぜんいき) = the entire area/region. 全部(ぜんぶ) = all of it / everything.

qs.s: 「全体」の意味は？
qs.e: 全体 = the thing as a whole (全体像 = the overall picture, 全体的に = overall/as a whole). 全般 = broadly across all aspects (全般的に問題がある = problems across the board).

m: part; portion; some; a copy (of a document)

ex.jp: 計画の一部を変更することになった。
ex.en: It was decided to change part of the plan.

qs.s: この情報はまだ＿＿＿＿の関係者にしか公開されていない。
qs.en: This information has only been disclosed to some of the relevant parties.
qs.e: 一部(いちぶ) = a part/some (一部の人 = some people, 一部変更 = a partial change). 一部分(いちぶぶん) = a part/portion (emphasizing it's a fraction). ごく一部 = only a very small portion. 少数(しょうすう) = a minority/small number.

qs.s: 「一部」の意味は？
qs.e: 一部 = a part of the whole (一部始終 = the whole story, 一部を除いて = except for a part). As a counter: 書類一部 = one copy of the document.

m: rough guide; benchmark; rough standard

ex.jp: 一日の勉強時間の目安は二時間程度だ。
ex.en: The rough guide for daily study time is about two hours.

qs.s: 完成まで一週間が＿＿＿＿ですが、内容次第で変わる場合があります。
qs.en: One week is a rough guide to completion, but it may vary depending on the content.
qs.e: 目安(めやす) = a rough guide/yardstick (approximate). 目処(めど) = a rough timing target. 目標(もくひょう) = a concrete goal. 基準(きじゅん) = a standard/criterion (more official).

qs.s: 「目安」の意味は？
qs.e: 目安 = a rough benchmark to go by (費用の目安 = a rough cost estimate, 目安にする = to use as a rough guide). Less rigid than 基準.

m: to work on; to be involved in; to handle

ex.jp: この建築家は世界中で多くの有名な建物を手がけている。
ex.en: This architect has worked on many famous buildings around the world.

qs.s: 若手ながら、すでに多くの大型プロジェクトを＿＿＿＿いる実力派だ。
qs.en: Despite being young, he is already a talented professional who has handled many large projects.
qs.e: 手がける(てがける) = to be personally involved in/work on (with skill). 担当する(たんとうする) = to be in charge of (assigned). 手を染める(てをそめる) = to get involved in (often with negative nuance).

qs.s: 「手がける」の意味は？
o: to work on; to be personally involved in
qs.e: 手がける implies personal craft or expertise (作品を手がける = to work on a piece, 初めて手がける仕事 = a job handled for the first time). 手掛け is an alternate spelling.

m: to bring; to cause; to produce; to bring about

ex.jp: 新しい技術は私たちの生活に大きな変化をもたらした。
ex.en: New technology has brought great changes to our lives.

qs.s: この政策は経済に好影響を＿＿＿＿と期待されている。
qs.en: This policy is expected to bring positive effects to the economy.
qs.e: もたらす = to bring about (results, changes — can be positive or negative). 与える(あたえる) = to give/have (an effect). 生む(うむ) = to produce/generate. 引き起こす(ひきおこす) = to trigger (usually negative).

qs.s: 「もたらす」の意味は？
o: to bring about; to produce (positive or negative)
qs.e: もたらす = being the cause that brings a result (利益をもたらす = to bring profits, 被害をもたらす = to cause damage). Neutral about whether the result is good or bad.

m: to let go of; to give up; to sell; to release

ex.jp: 長年大切にしてきた本を手放すのは寂しかった。
ex.en: It was sad to let go of books I had cherished for many years.

qs.s: このビジネスチャンスを＿＿＿＿のは惜しい。
qs.en: It would be a shame to let go of this business opportunity.
qs.e: 手放す(てばなす) = to release from your hands / give up (a possession, opportunity). 手離す = variant writing. 逃す(のがす) = to miss/let slip (a chance). 捨てる(すてる) = to throw away/discard.

qs.s: 「手放す」の意味は？
o: to let go of; to give up; to sell
to miss; to let slip (a chance)
qs.e: 手放す = releasing something you were holding (手放せない = can't let go of, 手放しで喜ぶ = to rejoice unreservedly/without reservation).

m: to step forward; to take a first step; to venture

ex.jp: 失敗を恐れずに新しい世界へ踏み出すことが大切だ。
ex.en: It is important to step out into a new world without fearing failure.

qs.s: 夢に向かって最初の一歩を＿＿＿＿勇気が必要だ。
qs.en: Courage is needed to take the first step toward your dream.
qs.e: 踏み出す(ふみだす) = to take a step forward (first steps). 踏み切る(ふみきる) = to take the plunge (decisive action after hesitation). 踏み込む(ふみこむ) = to step into/delve into. 歩み出す(あゆみだす) = to begin to walk forward (literary).

qs.s: 「踏み出す」の意味は？
o: to step forward; to take a first step
to step into; to delve into
qs.e: 踏み出す = taking a first, forward step (新しい一歩を踏み出す = to take a new step forward, 社会に踏み出す = to step out into society).

m: to read; to interpret; to grasp (from context)

ex.jp: グラフからデータの傾向を読み取ることができる。
ex.en: You can read the trend of the data from the graph.

qs.s: 相手の表情から気持ちを＿＿＿＿ことは、コミュニケーションの基本だ。
qs.en: Reading the other person's feelings from their expression is a basic of communication.
qs.e: 読み取る(よみとる) = to read/interpret (information, expression, graphs). 読み解く(よみとく) = to decipher/decode (complex text). 察する(さっする) = to infer/sense (feelings, intentions). 感じ取る(かんじとる) = to sense/feel (emotionally).

qs.s: 「読み取る」の意味は？
o: to read; to interpret; to extract information
qs.e: 読み取る = extracting meaning from something visual or written (データを読み取る = to read data, 空気を読み取る = to read the atmosphere).

m: proportion; ratio; percentage; relatively

ex.jp: 全体の約三割の割合で女性が管理職についている。
ex.en: About 30% of the total proportion are women in management positions.

qs.s: 参加者のうち、外国人が占める＿＿＿＿が年々増えている。
qs.en: The proportion of foreigners among participants is increasing year by year.
qs.e: 割合(わりあい) = proportion/ratio (general everyday term). 比率(ひりつ) = ratio/rate (more mathematical). パーセンテージ = percentage (loanword). 比例(ひれい) = proportion/proportionality (mathematical relation).

qs.s: 「割合」の意味は？
qs.e: 割合 = share or ratio (割合が高い = high proportion, 割合に = relatively/comparatively). As an adverb: 割合うまくいった = it went relatively well.

m: to damage; to harm; to impair; to spoil

ex.jp: 無理な運動は健康を損なうおそれがある。
ex.en: Overexercising may harm your health.

qs.s: 不適切な発言が会社のイメージを＿＿＿＿た。
qs.en: The inappropriate comment damaged the company's image.
qs.e: 損なう(そこなう) = to damage/impair (health, image, trust). 傷つける(きずつける) = to hurt/wound (physically or emotionally). 悪化させる(あっかさせる) = to make worse. 壊す(こわす) = to break/destroy.

qs.s: 「損なう」の意味は？
o: to damage; to impair; to harm
qs.e: 損なう = reducing the quality or integrity of something (健康を損なう = to damage health, 信頼を損なう = to undermine trust). Also: やり損なう = to fail in doing something.

m: to follow someone's example; to learn from; to emulate

ex.jp: 先輩の誠実な仕事ぶりを見習いたいと思っている。
ex.en: I want to follow my senior's example of sincere work.

qs.s: 諸外国の成功事例を＿＿＿＿、新しい政策を立案すべきだ。
qs.en: We should draw up new policies by learning from the successful examples of other countries.
qs.e: 見習う(みならう) = to follow someone's example/emulate. 参考にする(さんこうにする) = to use as a reference. 模倣する(もほうする) = to imitate. 真似する(まねする) = to copy/mimic.

qs.s: 「見習う」の意味は？
o: to follow one's example; to emulate
qs.e: 見習う = taking someone as a model to learn from (先輩を見習う = to follow one's senior's example). 見習い = an apprentice/trainee (noun).

m: natural; obvious; of course; rightfully

ex.jp: 努力した分だけ結果が出るのは当然のことだ。
ex.en: It is only natural that you get results proportional to your effort.

qs.s: ルールを破れば罰せられるのは＿＿＿＿だ。
qs.en: It is only natural to be punished for breaking the rules.
qs.e: 当然(とうぜん) = natural/rightfully so (formal). 当たり前(あたりまえ) = obvious/natural (casual everyday). 必然(ひつぜん) = inevitable (logical necessity). 必ず(かならず) = without fail (adverb).

qs.s: 「当然」の意味は？
qs.e: 当然 is the formal equivalent of 当たり前 (当然の結果 = a natural result, 当然ながら = naturally/as is to be expected, 当然の権利 = a rightful entitlement).

m: to expect; to anticipate; to count on

ex.jp: 来年の売上は今年より二割増しを見込んでいる。
ex.en: We are anticipating a 20% increase in next year's sales compared to this year.

qs.s: コスト削減効果を三千万円と＿＿＿＿でいるが、実際はどうだろうか。
qs.en: We are counting on a cost reduction effect of 30 million yen, but how will it actually turn out?
qs.e: 見込む(みこむ) = to anticipate/project (a figure or outcome). 予測する(よそくする) = to predict/forecast. 期待する(きたいする) = to expect/hope for. 目標にする = to set as a goal.

qs.s: 「見込む」の意味は？
qs.e: 見込む = judging that something will amount to X (黒字を見込む = to anticipate a surplus, 見込み客 = a prospective customer). The noun 見込み = expectation/likelihood.

m: degree; extent; level

ex.jp: ストレスの度合いによって、対処法も変わる。
ex.en: The appropriate coping method also changes depending on the degree of stress.

qs.s: 満足の＿＿＿＿を調べるため、アンケートを実施した。
qs.en: We conducted a survey to investigate the degree of satisfaction.
qs.e: 度合い(どあい) = degree/extent (of a quality/feeling). 程度(ていど) = degree/level (more general). レベル = level (loanword). 尺度(しゃくど) = a scale/measure (for measuring something).

qs.s: 「度合い」の意味は？
qs.e: 度合い = how much or how intense something is (依存の度合い = the degree of dependence, 熟成の度合い = the level of maturity).

m: to attract; to draw in; to fascinate

ex.jp: 彼女の演技は観客の心を引き付けた。
ex.en: Her performance captivated the hearts of the audience.

qs.s: その映画の予告編は多くの人の関心を強く＿＿＿＿た。
qs.en: The trailer for that film strongly attracted the interest of many people.
qs.e: 引き付ける(ひきつける) = to attract/draw in (attention, people). 惹きつける(ひきつける) = variant kanji, same meaning. 魅了する(みりょうする) = to fascinate/enchant. 引き寄せる(ひきよせる) = to draw closer/pull toward.

qs.s: 「引き付ける」の意味は？
o: to draw closer; to pull toward
qs.e: 引き付ける = drawing something toward you magnetically (人を引き付ける魅力 = appeal that attracts people, 注意を引き付ける = to attract attention).
